mapper.select: SELECT projection_key, projection_type, last_version, update_time FROM class2_counter_projection_state WHERE projection_key = #{projectionKey} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class2_counter_projection_state(projection_key, projection_type, last_version, update_time) VALUES(#{projectionKey}, #{projectionType}, #{lastVersion}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE projection_key = projection_key
